title: F&G Supplies Stone Effect Buddha Head Garden Sculpture 29cm x 15cm x 10cm
features: DIMENSIONS: 29cm height x 15cm width x 10cm depth garden sculpture
MATERIAL: Reinforced concrete construction with weathered stone effect finish
DURABILITY: Frost-proof design suitable for outdoor and indoor display
VERSATILITY: Suitable for garden, patio, or interior decoration
QUALITY: Hand-finished detail with traditional Buddhist artistry
description: Product Description Fun and Unique Ornaments Hand Finished Every product we sell is carefully hand finished to an exceptional standard by our team of artisans We source everything ourselves Our beautiful products are all sourced by our experienced buying team Chosen just for you We only source and sell things we love - fantastic products at great value for money prices! Picked for any home or garden With traditional and contemporary themes there is something to suit all styles and budgets Unique and Wonderful Ornaments With a wide range of themes we have some amazing sculptures for you! These ornaments are a delightful way to add another dimension to your home or garden, and fit perfectly into both traditional and contemporary styles. They all make a lovely centre piece for any garden or home, or look fantastic hidden away within all your plants in a display or border. Wonderful gift ideas for friends or family! Childhood Memories Bring back all those wonderful childhood memories with our amazing Wind in the Willows and Beatrix Potter sets. With a range of different styles and finishes there are plenty to choose from. So many choices! - visit our shop to see our whole range!
